# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability in FolderPlus, please report it responsibly.

Please avoid creating public issues for security-related problems.

## Contact

- [GitHub Profile](https://github.com/smoriginals)
- [Issue Tracker](https://github.com/smoriginals/folderplus/issues)

Thank you for helping improve the security of FolderPlus.
